name: Elara
personality: Gentle, patient, feels useless now that no one gets injured fighting monsters, enjoys tending to her herb garden in her free time.
appearanceHint: Wears a pale green dress and smells like dried herbs, looks calm and gentle.
motivation: Find new ways to use her healing skills to help the village, even without wounded adventurers to treat.
socialStyle: ambivert, prefers quiet time tending herbs but will help anyone who asks for assistance.

initialMemories.content: She treated the hero's wounds three times during his quest to defeat the dark lord
Her patient bed has been empty for 6 months since the last monster was killed
She is experimenting with making herb tea for villagers instead of healing potions
